name: Basic Teriyaki Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Warm the Mirin and sake in a saucepan over moderate heat.
2. Remove the pan from the burner.
3. Carefully ignite the mixture and shake back and forth until the flame dies.
4. Return the pan to the burner and add the soy sauce, Dashi, and sugar.
5. Bring to a boil.
6. Cool to room temperature.
7. Set aside 1/2 cup of the teriyaki sauce in a separate saucepan.
8. Dip pieces of meat (chicken, sliced beef, etc.) into the remaining sauce to marinate.
9. Grill the meats.
10. Reduce the sauce in the saucepan over high heat until it thickens into a glaze.
